title: Email Update to Project Board Discussion and update the Project in the Portfolio
excerpt:

posts.author: jfadden (James Fadden)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’ve found that executive leadership monitors updates from the project portfolio while sponsor and project team members monitor progress through project board. It would be helpful to email updates to both the project update in the portfolio and to the project’s board discussion in the same email using both email addresses. Conversely it would be helpful to link the project update in the portfolio to the discussion board of the project within monday.com.

What are you trying to achieve

Be able to email an update to both the portfolio and the project board or to be able to connect the Updates of a project and the portfolio.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is actually where I’d push you away from email entirely and toward automation.

Why not workflow/automate this instead of email?

Cleaner pattern

Project board = source of truth
Portfolio board = rollup / exec view

Then:

“When an update is posted on project item → create/update on portfolio item”

Now:

  • Teams keep working where they already are

  • Execs get visibility without extra effort

  • No dependency on email behavior

posts.author: jfadden (James Fadden)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the idea. I’m looking for a way to link what I write in a project board discussion update to the update for the project in the portfolio. Perhaps, I’m missing something but, it seems your suggestion is about the task updates - which is too in the weeds for the execs. Actually what I would like is an extra checkbox in the Board Discussion that also adds the update to Project in the Portfolio.

Thoughts?
